/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/dtcpStackTestClient.dir/dtcpStackTestClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtcpStackTestClient.dir/DtcpStackTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtcpStackTestClient.dir/ClientTestConfig.cpp.o -o ../../bin/dtcpStackTestClient  ../../lib/libApplCore.a ../../lib/libAlpineProtocol.a ../../lib/libAlpineTransport.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a ../../lib/libNetUtils.a ../../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../../lib/libDtcp.a ../../lib/libNetUtils.a ../../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libSysUtils.a ../../lib/libTransBase.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../../lib/libspdlog.a
